epic.title: EVA Data Model — Maintenance & Extension Tooling
epic.description:
Zero-drift model — every source change that affects a model object is automatically detected, flagged, and either auto-patched (agent path) or surfaced as an ADO bug (manual path) — within one sprint cycle.

Three gaps block the model from staying accurate without manual effort:
1. No CI gate — validate-model.ps1 is not run on every PR.
2. No drift detection — sync-from-source.ps1 exists but is never automatically triggered.
3. No coverage signal — coverage-gaps.ps1 does not exist yet.
A fourth gap: no model-sync agent (Sprint-9).

Depends on: EVA Data Model initial build epic (COMPLETE, all WIs Done, id=30).

features.title: CI Gate & Same-PR Enforcement
features.description: GitHub Actions run validate-model.ps1 on every PR that touches model/** or schema/**. Merge is blocked if exit code != 0. A second job checks that assemble-model.ps1 was run before the PR was opened (same-PR rule). Includes coverage-gaps.ps1 script (DM-MAINT-WI-0).

features.title: Automated Drift Detection
features.description: Scheduled workflow (Mondays 06:00 UTC) runs sync-from-source.ps1 -OutputFormat json and opens an ADO bug for every IN_SOURCE_ONLY, STATUS_MISMATCH, or FIELD_DRIFT finding. Drift report uploaded as GitHub Actions artifact. Requires sync-from-source.ps1 JSON output mode (DM-MAINT-WI-4).

features.title: Coverage Gaps Surface
features.description: coverage-gaps.ps1 lists requirements with zero test_ids and endpoints with no satisfied_by back-reference. Output wired into the drift-detection workflow: each uncovered requirement opens an ADO work item tagged [COVERAGE].

features.title: Model-Sync Agent
features.description: Agent-fleet agent that accepts a structured diff (source_repo, layer, operation, object) and produces an RFC 6902 JSON Patch for the target layer file plus the validate command. Integrated into sprint-execute.yml Do phase so that WIs tagged same-pr-required:37-data-model auto-raise a 37-data-model PR.

user_stories.title: [DM-MAINT-WI-0] coverage-gaps.ps1 — requirements with zero test coverage
user_stories.description:
Write scripts/coverage-gaps.ps1. Reads eva-model.json and outputs two pipeline-friendly arrays:
1. Requirements where test_ids is empty or missing.
2. Endpoints where no requirement's satisfied_by lists them.
Output must be PowerShell objects (not plain text) so the drift workflow can pipe them.
user_stories.acceptance_criteria:
- .\scripts\coverage-gaps.ps1 exits 0 from repo root
- | Where-Object { $_.kind -eq 'requirement' } returns all zero-coverage requirements
- | Where-Object { $_.kind -eq 'endpoint' } returns all endpoints with no satisfied_by back-ref
- Script listed in README.md scripts table
- validate-model.ps1 still PASS after script addition

user_stories.title: [DM-MAINT-WI-1] GitHub Action — validate-model on every PR
user_stories.description:
Create .github/workflows/validate-model.yml. Triggers on pull_request paths: model/**, schema/**, scripts/**.
Steps: (1) checkout, (2) pwsh scripts/assemble-model.ps1, (3) pwsh scripts/validate-model.ps1 — fails if exit != 0, (4) upload model/eva-model.json as artifact eva-model-pr-<PR_NUMBER>.
Runs on ubuntu-latest using pwsh.
user_stories.acceptance_criteria:
- PR modifying model/endpoints.json -> workflow runs and passes
- Deliberate dangling reference -> workflow fails with DANGLING_REF message
- Workflow passes actionlint with 0 warnings
- Badge added to README.md

user_stories.title: [DM-MAINT-WI-4] sync-from-source.ps1 — add -OutputFormat json mode
user_stories.description: Add -OutputFormat parameter to scripts/sync-from-source.ps1: 'text' (default, existing behaviour) or 'json' (outputs array of drift objects). Each object: { object_id, layer, status, source_value, model_value }. Prerequisite for DM-MAINT-WI-3.
user_stories.acceptance_criteria:
- .\scripts\sync-from-source.ps1 -OutputFormat json | ConvertFrom-Json parses without error
- Each object has: object_id, layer, status (IN_MODEL_ONLY / IN_SOURCE_ONLY / STATUS_MISMATCH / FIELD_DRIFT / SYNC), source_value, model_value
- Default text behaviour unchanged — no regression

user_stories.title: [DM-MAINT-WI-3] Scheduled drift-detection workflow
user_stories.description:
Create .github/workflows/drift-detection.yml. Trigger: schedule cron '0 6 * * 1' (Mondays 06:00 UTC) + workflow_dispatch.
Steps: (1) checkout 37-data-model + companion repos, (2) sync-from-source.ps1 -OutputFormat json > drift-report.json, (3) for each non-SYNC entry open ADO bug tagged eva-data-model;drift;auto, (4) upload drift-report.json as artifact.
Graceful if ADO_PAT secret not set.
user_stories.acceptance_criteria:
- workflow_dispatch run completes without error
- drift-report.json artifact present
- Deliberate STATUS_MISMATCH -> ADO bug created within 2 minutes
- No drift -> 0 new ADO WIs created
- Missing ADO_PAT -> exits 0 with log message 'ADO_PAT not set — skipping bug creation'

user_stories.title: [DM-MAINT-WI-2] Same-PR enforcement — source change without model update = blocking comment
user_stories.description: Add scripts/check-same-pr.ps1 and a same-pr-check job to validate-model.yml. The script diffs HEAD vs base branch, identifies layer files touched, and checks that eva-model.json mtime > all sourced JSON files (i.e. assemble was run). Exit 1 if not assembled.
user_stories.acceptance_criteria:
- PR: updates model/endpoints.json but skips assemble -> same-pr-check fails
- PR: updates model/endpoints.json and runs assemble -> same-pr-check passes
- PR touching only README.md -> same-pr-check job skipped
- check-same-pr.ps1 documented in README.md scripts table

user_stories.title: [DM-MAINT-WI-5] Wire coverage-gaps.ps1 into drift-detection workflow
user_stories.description: Add step to drift-detection.yml after sync-from-source: run coverage-gaps.ps1 -OutputFormat json > coverage-report.json. For each requirement with zero test_ids, open ADO WI: '[COVERAGE] <requirement_id> — no test coverage'. Upload coverage-report.json as artifact.
user_stories.acceptance_criteria:
- Requirement with zero test_ids -> ADO WI created on next run
- No gaps -> 0 WIs created, workflow exits 0
- coverage-report.json artifact present on every run

user_stories.title: [DM-MAINT-WI-6] model-sync-agent scaffold
user_stories.description: New agent: accepts { source_repo, layer, operation, object } and returns { patch: [RFC 6902 ops], validate_command, pr_title, pr_body }. Loads current layer JSON, produces patch via Foundry model (gpt-4.1 or FOUNDRY_MODEL_DEPLOYMENT_NAME env var). Register in model/agents.json.
user_stories.acceptance_criteria:
- POST { source_repo: '33-eva-brain-v2', layer: 'endpoints', operation: 'add', object: {...} } -> valid RFC 6902 patch; applying it passes validate-model.ps1
- Model configurable via FOUNDRY_MODEL_DEPLOYMENT_NAME
- Agent registered in model/agents.json
- Unsupported layer -> 422 with clear message

user_stories.title: [DM-MAINT-WI-7] Integrate model-sync-agent into sprint-execute.yml Do phase
user_stories.description: When sprint-execute.yml labels a WI with same-pr-required:37-data-model, the Do phase POSTs to model-sync-agent, applies the returned patch, and opens a PR on 37-data-model. The Act phase is triggered by that PR's validate-model.yml CI. Requires new tool: model-sync in 29-foundry skill registry.
user_stories.acceptance_criteria:
- WI tagged same-pr-required:37-data-model completes Do phase -> PR opened on 37-data-model with JSON patch
- validate-model.yml runs on that PR and passes
- WI without the tag -> no 37-data-model PR created
- PR description contains resolves #<source-wi-id>
